description_long: This is a compact single-board computer, specifically a Raspberry Pi, featuring a green printed circuit board densely populated with electronic components. On one side, there are four USB ports and an Ethernet port, all encased in metallic housings, providing connectivity for peripherals and networking. The board is marked with the Raspberry Pi logo and various certification labels, and it includes a prominent 40-pin GPIO header for hardware interfacing. Other visible components include HDMI, audio, and micro-USB power ports, as well as several integrated circuits and surface-mounted elements. The underside of the board reveals solder points and additional circuitry, with mounting holes at the corners for secure placement. This device is typically used for educational, prototyping, or embedded computing applications in urban environments.
description: A compact Raspberry Pi single-board computer with multiple USB and Ethernet ports, a 40-pin GPIO header, and a green PCB densely populated with electronic components.
description_view_0: The top view highlights the Raspberry Pi logo, GPIO header, and the arrangement of USB and Ethernet ports.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the stacked USB and Ethernet ports, showing their metallic housings and port arrangement.
description_view_2: The underside view reveals the solder points, circuitry, and mounting holes, with the ports visible at the edge.
description_view_3: This angled view focuses on the GPIO header pins and the edge connectors, with a partial view of the ports.
